devicesets.name: TC2030_ICSP
devicesets.description:
TAG-CONNECT ICSP Connector


Manufacturer: Tag-Connect

Cable for easy In-Circuit Serial Programming. Designed for Microchip ICD2, suitable for many others.
Two variants - one "with legs" (for hands-free fit on PCB) and another "without legs" for quick programming.

PADDescription
1MCLR/Vpp
2Vdd
3GND
4PGD (ISPDAT)
5PGC (ISPCLK)
6nc (used for LVP)


©2009 ROFA.cz - modified and updated by Robert Darlington ‹rdarlington@gmail.com›

footprints.name: TC2030-MCP
footprints.description:
TAG-CONNECT ICSP Connector - Legged version
Manufacturer: Tag-Connect

Cable for easy In-Circuit Serial Programming. Designed for Microchip ICD2, suitable for many others.

NOTE: Eagle's default spacing for drill holes does not leave sufficent room for routing traces for this footprint and should be adjusted.
This setting can be found in the board layout editor under the Edit menu. Select "Design Rules" and then the Distance tab. 8 mils for Drill/Hole works well.
PADDescription
1MCLR/Vpp
2Vdd
3GND
4PGD (ISPDAT)
5PGC (ISPCLK)
6nc (used for LVP)


©2009 ROFA.cz - modified and updated by Robert Darlington ‹rdarlington@gmail.com›
footprints.headline: TAG-CONNECT ICSP Connector - Legged versionManufacturer: Tag-Connect

footprints.name: TC2030-MCP-NL-CP
footprints.description:
TAG-CONNECT ICSP Connector- with optional copper pads for steel alignment pins
Manufacturer: Tag-Connect

Cable for easy In-Circuit Serial Programming. Designed for Microchip ICD2, suitable for many others.

NOTE: Eagle's default spacing for drill holes does not leave sufficent room for routing traces for this footprint and should be adjusted.
This setting can be found in the board layout editor under the Edit menu. Select "Design Rules" and then the Distance tab. 8 mils for Drill/Hole works well.
PADDescription
1MCLR/Vpp
2Vdd
3GND
4PGD (ISPDAT)
5PGC (ISPCLK)
6nc (used for LVP)


Note: Suitable Receptacle pins are 0295-0-15-xx-06-xx-10-0 series from Mill-Max

©2009 ROFA.cz - modified and updated by Robert Darlington ‹rdarlington@gmail.com›
